## Pull request

### Playtest loop
- [ ] Linked playtest issue or volunteer review, if this PR responds to community feedback.
- [ ] Maintainer/Owner approval remains required for merge and public publish.

### Governance checklist
<!-- agent-corps governance: S-4 -->
- [ ] **S-4 red-team pass** recorded if this PR touches auth / exec / data / money surfaces (see GOVERNANCE.md / CORPS_CONSTITUTION §S-4).
